feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to customize user status for technical objects in sap public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello,

when i connect to SAP public cloud and open technical objects i can see the field userstatus, i want to know how can i customize it and add values to it cause in the customization board i can't see any task related to it.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to connect RF device to sap public cloud CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer.
entry.content: I would like to understand how to connect RF device (CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer, certified by Google's Android Enterprise Recommended (AER)) connecting to SAP public cloud to use for warehouse functionalities.

entry.title: How to connect RF device to sap public cloud CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer.
entry.content: Is there any document on RF device connection to public cloud, i would like to connect Cipherlab RK95 android device for WM activities.

entry.title: Backup Status of Public Edition ERP
entry.content:
Hi guys,

My client is about the choose Public Edition ERP and plan to IPO this year. According to the auditor from big 4, client needs to get the notification (eg email) if cloud backup failed, or they can find the data backup status in a dashboard. 

Does any management mechanism to know the backup status?

Thanks

Yvonne
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #Backups

entry.title: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi All 

We have set up a Communication arrangement between SAP Public Cloud and SAP 4/Hana on Premise.  we are using SAP_COM_0224

What we have managed to do is Create and send the Purchase Order to the system via EDI. The Output Parameter Determination is set up for Purchase Order. 

Now what is still missing is the ability to "update and Cancel" the Purchase Order and have the Message be send out via EDI again. Only the Initial Message for the Creation of the Purchase Order is send out. 

My Question is: What do i need to configure that everytime someone changes the PO (Adds an Item or deletes it) a new EDI message with the change is created?

entry.title: Employee´s cost center
entry.content:
Hello!

We have a customer request to register an employee for more than one cost center. Is it possible to make this configuration within  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition   ? In S/4 hana private it is possible to use the infotype 0027.

Thank you!

entry.title: Automatically attach the printed document to the sales invoice in S/4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are looking for a way to automatically attach the original printed pdf file that has been sent to the customer to the sales invoice document in S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

This is something we can manage in the on-premise edition using the Archive Link feature. But we didn't find the way to do it in the Public Cloud Edition. 

This is strong requirement of our customer and probably a legal requirement for France. 

Could someone tell us if and how it ?

entry.title: Why is the where used feature no working properly in ADT Eclipse in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on a SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud system version 2402.

I encountered an error when releasing a Transport Request and decided to debugg in Eclipse. I found that report CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE was called and submitted in background in method "submit_job_report" of if_xco_bg_mgd_host:

Once done, I wanted to do use the where used list upon report "CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE" to find the above mentioned calling method and class, but the where used did not return any result, eventhough I selected all the object types: 

 

I tried with a message from a message class, and same the where used did not work properly!

Am I missing something in the where used properties to make it work?

Thank you

entry.title: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target system available
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on a SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud system version 2402.

I encountered an error when releasing a CBC Transport Request: "Export for transport type CBC locked. No target system available". (Error message: ATO_CMN_EXPORT 036). By the way, I am on a development system and not a starter system. 

Anyone knows why the error is raised? Is it because it might be that the quality system has not been yet provisioned? (the basis guy is on holidays moreover, so, I am afraid we will be stuck for one entire week...)

Is this an action that should be done in CBC? or in Calm?

I tried to debugg in Eclipse ADT the error message when releasing the transport request. I found that report CTO_REQUEST_RELEASE was called and submitted in background for this purpose in the backend. I tried to find a way to debug the background process of the report, but did not succeed. Also in the SAP Community, some recent posts from 04.2024 mentioned that it is not possible in public cloud. Is that really the case? No possibility to debug the report submitted in background in ADT as we used to do before or on premise with SM50 etc?

Thank you

entry.title: Public Cloud alternative to FI_TAX_BADI_011-016
entry.content:
Dear community,

does anyone know about an alternative to FI_TAX_BADI_011 - 016 in S4 HANA Public Cloud?

I'm trying to fill field USER_FIELD_A in the application S_ALR_87012357 Advance return for tax on sales/purchases (program RFUMSV00).

I know about FI_TAX_BADI*, but I'm afraid it's not released for the Public Cloud.

Thanks in advance,

Matus

entry.title: SAP S4/Hana (Public) Cloud Profit Center Group missing
entry.content:
I have deployed the "SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" Solutio scenario in my TDD Public Cloud tenant, but standard profit center group YBPH has not been delivered.

Despite assigning all of the standard business roles to my user, I am unable to create it as I get this error:

I need to create a Profit Center Group and Profit Center in order to create Cost Centers.

What could I possibly be missing?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: DEBUG Custom logic S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content: I just wanted to understand in S4HANA Cloud public edition , if I need to debug the logic written inside BADI within CUSTOM LOGIC app. How could I perform ? Also i don't have ADT luxury.

entry.title: I had public cloud and SAP BTP DMS service issue
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I had public cloud and SAP BTP DMS service the configuration as per required. Now when i am doing the attachment from Document management i.e. CV01N than file is getting saved to BTP DMS that i can see by using CMIS.

Now issue is when i save file for purchase order tile or PR tile the file is getting save to GOS and not in DMS. Also when i am trying to save file with custom application its not getting save to DMS

Please help where the configuration is missing.

entry.title: Public cloud save file to FTP
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I had custom application in which i want to save pdf and xls file to ftp server . Can we do this directly with custom application or it is possible with CPI.

Dose we have any document to check for the same.

entry.title: Integation SAP S4hana Public Cloud with 3rd Party SW ( No HTTPS)
entry.content:
Hi, i need to integrate a third party software ( SW Warehouse that use other protocol then https ) with S4HANA Public Cloud . Since S4HANA Public only works with HTTPS !

The only option is to use SAP CPI to convert from https <-> RFC ? 

Or there is another solution ?

Thanks for your help

Rui Gonzalez

entry.title: Clarification regarding accounting principle assignment / S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
We are implementing the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system for a Client from the Automotive Industry and have a question about the ledger and accounting principle assignments. Currently, ledger setup and respective accounting principles is as following:

0L – Leading ledger, combining local GAAP principles for two company codes (Polish and Mexican). Both companies have the same YCOA chart of accounts.

2L – Non leading ledger assigned to one IFRS principle, for both company codes.

Therefore, we would like to ask for your recommendation regarding such setup and know if there are any possible future constraints.

Please note that both companies share the same fiscal year which corresponds with the standard calendar year and there is no plan to change it.

Moreover, a lot of transactional data was already posted due to ongoing tests.

Thank You! 
Best regards,
Michal Czubaszewski

entry.title: Restrict release of production order if no cost exists In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
entry.content:
In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. we want to restrict release of production order, if there is no standard cost exist for material.

 

thank you in advance

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
Hi, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
i, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: BRF+ in S/4 HANA Public Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Public Cloud Experts, 

We have developed multiple BRF+ applications in our current On-Premise Landscape for forms and other custom RAP applications . Now we are looking at moving some of our custom to Cloud . When we build Custom BRF+ applications using the BRF+ application in the starter tenant and when i try to call the BRF+ application using the class cl_fdt_function_process class the get the error that the class is not permitted in the cloud .

Can you anyone guide me how to access BRF+ applications from Public cloud Developer Extensionsibilty ?

 

Thanks,

Vijaya
